title: Job Scraper Input
description: Configure which jobs to scrape and from where.

keyword.title: Job Keyword
keyword.description: Job title or keyword to search for. e.g. 'React Developer', 'Data Analyst'

location.title: Location
location.description: City, country, or region to filter jobs. e.g. 'London, UK' or 'Remote'

scrapeLinkedIn.title: Scrape LinkedIn
scrapeLinkedIn.description: Enable to scrape LinkedIn job listings.

customUrls.title: Custom Job Website URLs
customUrls.description: Add links to any job listing pages you want to scrape (e.g. company careers pages, Indeed search results, etc.)

maxJobsPerSource.title: Max Jobs Per Source
maxJobsPerSource.description: Maximum number of jobs to scrape per website.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy settings. Recommended to use residential proxies for LinkedIn.
